creator: ychsiao@ychsiao.org
text:
please help to commit, thanks!

* Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> [100928 03:20]:
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-YAML-Tiny,
>
> Please note that PR ports/151008 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/151008
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
